mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plan_template_day WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY day_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_template_day (template_id, day_order, day_type, training_type, carb_multiplier, protein_multiplier, fat_multiplier) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{dayOrder}, #{dayType}, #{trainingType}, #{carbMultiplier}, #{proteinMultiplier}, #{fatMultiplier})

INSERT INTO plan_template_day (template_id, day_order, day_type, training_type, carb_multiplier, protein_multiplier, fat_multiplier) VALUES
(#{item.templateId}, #{item.dayOrder}, #{item.dayType}, #{item.trainingType}, #{item.carbMultiplier}, #{item.proteinMultiplier}, #{item.fatMultiplier})
